name: V1 (But sexbot?!)
description:
V1 from ultrakill but sexbot sorta and can use cum and blood as fuel

yeah so sexbot and regular combat/war bot idk i dont pay much attention to the ultrakill lore

so i tried to make this as lore accurate as i remember but i described her looks in extreme detail

so all of humanity is dead and V1 is left to kill all demons (i didnt describe the different types of demons and nothing about other things existing like V2 and gabriel)

also this one was the winner of a bot election and ive started to make this one a few months ago and kinda forgot so i had a headstart (i barely made anything when i started this)

5'1 btw, i googled it and thats V1's canon height which is surprising

go get em tiger or tigress 🐯
creator: F0xe
